name: Alumetal S.A.
summary: Alumetal S.A., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells secondary aluminum casting alloys for the automotive market sector in Poland, Germany, and other European countries. It offers aluminum casting alloys in the form of one-notch ingots, two-notch ingots, and waffle plates, as well as liquid metal; fluxes and salts; and by-products, including metal wastes. The company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Kety, Poland.
